channel.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2022
item.description:
Community Resources

Blogs and Scholarship

  • WS-DL Blog - Web Science and Digital Libraries Research Group blogs about various Web archiving related topics, scholarly work, and academic trip reports.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2022
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • Auto Archiverstars153 - Python script to automatically archive social media posts, videos, and images from a Google Sheets document. Read the article about Auto Archiver on bellingcat.com.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving May 23rd - May 29th, 2022
item.description:
Tools & Software

WARC I/O Libraries

  • Sparklingstars3 - Internet Archive's Sparkling Data Processing Library. (Stable)

    • Tools & Software

    Analysis

  • Archives Research Compute Hubstars4 - Web application for distributed compute analysis of Archive-It web archive collections. (Stable)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Feb 28th - Mar 6th, 2022
item.description:
Community Resources

Blogs and Scholarship

  • The Web as History - An open-source book that provides a conceptual overview to web archiving research, as well as several case studies.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jan 17th - Jan 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • Waybackpystars226 - Wayback Machine Save, CDX and availability API interface in Python and a command-line tool (Stable)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jan 3rd - Jan 9th, 2022
item.description:
Tools & Software

WARC I/O Libraries

  • Unwarcitstars5 - Command line interface to unzip WARC and WACZ files (Python).

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Dec 13th - Dec 19th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

WARC I/O Libraries

  • FastWARCstars20 - A high-performance WARC parsing library (Python).

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Nov 8th - Nov 14th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Replay

  • warc2htmlstars22 - Converts WARC files to static HTML suitable for browsing offline or rehosting.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Oct 4th - Oct 10th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • Waybackstars333 - A toolkit for snapshot webpage to Internet Archive, archive.today, IPFS and beyond. (Stable)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jul 19th - Jul 25th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Utilities

  • gowarcserverstars6 - BadgerDBstars11.4k-based capture index (CDX) and WARC record server, used to index and serve WARC files (Go).

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jul 12th - Jul 18th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • Web Curator Tool - Open-source workflow management for selective web archiving. (Stable)

    • Tools & Software

    Curation

  • Zotero Robust Links Extension - A Zotero extension that submits to and reads from web archives. Source on GitHubstars9. Supercedes leonkt/zotero-mementostars181.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • WAILstars289 - A graphical user interface (GUI) atop multiple web archiving tools intended to be used as an easy way for anyone to preserve and replay web pages; Python, Electronstars107. (Stable)
  • Warcproxstars317 - WARC-writing MITM HTTP/S proxy. (Stable)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving May 24th - May 30th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • 22120stars3k - A non-WARC-based tool which hooks into the Chrome browser and archives everything you browse making it available for offline replay. (In Development)
  • ArchiveBoxstars14.3k - A tool which maintains an additive archive from RSS feeds, bookmarks, and links using wget, Chrome headless, and other methods (formerly Bookmark Archiver). (In Development)
  • ArchiveWeb.Page - A plugin for Chrome and other Chromium based browsers that lets you interactively archive web pages, replay them, and export them as WARC data. Also available as an Electron based desktop application.
  • Browsertrix Crawlerstars209 - A Chrome based high-fidelity crawling system, designed to run a complex, customizable browser-based crawl in a single Docker container.
  • Brozzlerstars551 - A distributed web crawler (爬虫) that uses a real browser (Chrome or Chromium) to fetch pages and embedded urls and to extract links. (Stable)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Community Resources

Twitter

  • @WebSciDL - ODU Web Science and Digital Libraries Research Group.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Search & Discovery

  • playbackstars1 - A toolkit for searching archived webpages from Internet Archive, archive.today, Memento and beyond. (In Development)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Tools & Software

Utilities

  • httrack2warcstars21 - Convert HTTrack archives to WARC format (Java).

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • Cairnstars14 - A npm package and CLI tool for saving webpages. (Stable)
  • Obeliskstars142 - Go package and CLI tool for saving web page as single HTML file. (Stable)

    • Tools & Software

    Search & Discovery

  • Minkstars37 - A Google Chrome extension for querying Memento aggregators while browsing and integrating live-archived web navigation. (Stable)

    • Community Resources

    Mailing Lists

  • OpenWayback
  • WASAPI

    • Community Resources

    Slack

  • IIPC Slack - Ask @netpreserve for access.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Tools & Software

Replay

  • OpenWaybackstars429 - The open source project aimed to develop Wayback Machine, the key software used by web archives worldwide to play back archived websites in the user's browser. (Stable)
  • PyWbstars1k - A Python (2 and 3) implementation of web archival replay tools, sometimes also known as 'Wayback Machine'. (Stable)
  • ReplayWeb.Page - A browser-based, fully client-side replay engine for both local and remote WARC files.

    • Community Resources

    Blogs and Scholarship

  • UK Web Archive Blog

    • Community Resources

    Twitter

  • #WebArchiveWednesday

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Training/Documentation

  • For researchers using web archives:
    • GLAM Workbench: Web Archives - See also this related blog post on 'Asking questions with web archives'.
    • Archives Unleashed Toolkit documentation
    • Tutorial for Humanities researchers about how to explore Arquivo.pt

    • Tools & Software

    Acquisition

  • WebMemex - Browser extension for Firefox and Chrome which lets you archive web pages you visit. (In Development)

    • Community Resources

    Other Awesome Lists

  • Web Archiving Community
  • Awesome Mementostars65
  • The WARC Ecosystem
  • The Web Crawl section of COPTR

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
Tools & Software

Acquisition

  • archivenowstars334 - A Python library to push web resources into on-demand web archives. (Stable)
  • Chroniclerstars73 - Web browser with record and replay functionality. (In Development)
  • Crawl - A simple web crawler in Golang. (Stable)
  • crocoitestars38 - Crawl websites using headless Google Chrome/Chromium and save resources, static DOM snapshot and page screenshots to WARC files. (In Development)
  • F(b)arcstars75 - A commandline tool and Python library for archiving data from Facebook using the Graph API. (Stable)
  • freeze-drystars236 - JavaScript library to turn page into static, self-contained HTML document; useful for browser extensions. (In Development)
  • grab-sitestars917 - The archivist's web crawler: WARC output, dashboard for all crawls, dynamic ignore patterns. (Stable)
  • Heritrix - An open source, extensible, web-scale, archival quality web crawler. (Stable)
    • Heritrix Walkthroughstars8 (In Development)
  • html2warcstars8 - A simple script to convert offline data into a single WARC file. (Stable)
  • HTTrack - An open source website copying utility. (Stable)
  • monolithstars4.8k - CLI tool to save a web page as a single HTML file. (Stable)
  • SingleFilestars9.3k - Browser extension for Firefox/Chrome and CLI tool to save a faithful copy of a complete page as a single HTML file. (Stable)
  • SiteStory - A transactional archive that selectively captures and stores transactions that take place between a web client (browser) and a web server. (Stable)
  • Social Feed Manager - Open source software that enables users to create social media collections from Twitter, Tumblr, Flickr, and Sina Weibo public APIs. (Stable)
  • Squidwarcstars148 - An open source, high-fidelity, page interacting archival crawler that uses Chrome or Chrome Headless directly. (In Development)
  • StormCrawler - A collection of resources for building low-latency, scalable web crawlers on Apache Storm. (Stable)
  • twarcstars1.2k - A command line tool and Python library for archiving Twitter JSON data. (Stable)
  • WARCreate - A Google Chrome extension for archiving an individual webpage or website to a WARC file. (Stable)
  • Warcworkerstars48 - An open source, dockerized, queued, high fidelity web archiver based on Squidwarc with a simple web GUI. (Stable)
  • Web2Warcstars22 - An easy-to-use and highly customizable crawler that enables anyone to create their own little Web archives (WARC/CDX). (Stable)
  • Webrecorder - Create high-fidelity, interactive recordings of any web site you browse. (Stable)
  • Wget - An open source file retrieval utility that of version 1.14 supports writing warcs. (Stable)
  • Wget-luastars22 - Wget with Lua extension. (Stable)
  • Wpullstars459 - A Wget-compatible (or remake/clone/replacement/alternative) web downloader and crawler. (Stable)

    • Tools & Software

    Search & Discovery

  • Tempas v1 - Temporal web archive search based on Delicious tags. (Stable)
  • Tempas v2 - Temporal web archive search based on links and anchor texts extracted from the German web from 1996 to 2013 (results are not limited to German pages, e.g., Obama@2005-2009 in Tempas). (Stable)
  • webarchive-discoverystars100 - WARC and ARC full-text indexing and discovery tools, with a number of associated tools capable of using the index shown below. (Stable)
    • Shinestars37 - A prototype web archives exploration UI, developed with researchers as part of the Big UK Domain Data for the Arts and Humanities project. (Stable)
    • SolrWaybackstars67 - A backend Java and frontend VUE JS project with freetext search and a build in playback engine. Require Warc files has been index with the Warc-Indexer. The web application also has a wide range of data visualization tools and data export tools that can be used on the whole webarchive. SolrWayback 4 Bundle release contains all the software and dependencies in an out-of-the box solution that is easy to install.
    • Warclightstars44 - A Project Blacklight based Rails engine that supports the discovery of web archives held in the WARC and ARC formats. (In Development)
    • Waspstars21 - A fully functional prototype of a personal web archive and search system. (In Development)
    • Other possible options for builting a front-end are listed on in the webarchive-discovery wiki, here.

    • Tools & Software

    Utilities

  • httpreserve.info - Service to return the status of a web page or save it to the Internet Archive. Returns JSON via browser or command line via CURL using GET (Golang Package). (Stable)
  • HTTPreserve Workbenchstars2 - Tool and API to describe the status of a web page encoded in a simple JSON output describing current status, and earliest and latest links on wayback.org. Save a web page to the Internet Archive. Audit lists of URIs and output a CSV with the data described above (Golang). (In Development)
  • MementoMapstars5 - A Tool to Summarize Web Archive Holdings (Python). (In Development)
  • MemGatorstars43 - A Memento Aggregator CLI and Server (Golang). (Stable)
  • node-cdxjstars0 - CDXJ file parser (Node.js). (Stable)
  • OutbackCDXstars25 - RocksDB-based capture index (CDX) server supporting incremental updates and compression. Can be used as backend for OpenWayback, PyWb and Heritrix. (Stable)
  • py-wasapi-clientstars12 - Command line application to download crawls from WASAPI (Python). (Stable)
  • tikalinkextractstars7 - Extract hyperlinks as a seed for web archiving from folders of document types that can be parsed by Apache Tika (Golang, Apache Tika Server). (In Development)
  • wasapi-downloaderstars4 - Java command line application to download crawls from WASAPI. (Stable)
  • WarcPartitionerstars1 - Partition (W)ARC Files by MIME Type and Year. (Stable)
  • wikiteamstars530 - Tools for downloading and preserving wikis. (Stable)

    • Tools & Software

    WARC I/O Libraries

  • HadoopConcatGzstars9 - A Splitable Hadoop InputFormat for Concatenated GZIP Files (and *.warc.gz). (Stable)
  • Jwat - Libraries and tools for reading/writing/validating WARC/ARC/GZIP files (Java). (Stable)
  • node-warcstars74 - Parse WARC files or create WARC files using either Electron or chrome-remote-interfacestars3.8k (Node.js). (Stable)
  • Warcatstars114 - Tool and library for handling Web ARChive (WARC) files (Python). (Stable)

    • Tools & Software

    Analysis

  • ArchiveSparkstars125 - An Apache Spark framework (not only) for Web Archives that enables easy data processing, extraction as well as derivation. (Stable)
  • Archives Unleashed Notebooksstars18 - Notebooks for working with web archives with the Archives Unleashed Toolkit, and derivatives generated by the Archives Unleashed Toolkit. (Stable)
  • Archives Unleashed Toolkitstars121 - Archives Unleashed Toolkit (AUT) is an open-source platform for analyzing web archives with Apache Spark. (Stable)
  • Tweet Archvies Unleashed Toolkitstars8 - An open-source toolkit for analyzing line-oriented JSON Twitter archives with Apache Spark. (In Development)

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Mar 9th - Mar 15th, 2020
item.description:
Community Resources

Blogs and Scholarship

  • DSHR's Blog - David Rosenthal regularly reviews and summarizes work done in the Digital Preservation field.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Community Resources

Blogs and Scholarship

  • Web Archiving Roundtable - Unofficial blog of the Web Archiving Roundtable of the Society of American Archivists maintained by the members of the Web Archiving Roundtable.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
Community Resources

Twitter

  • @NetPreserve - Official IIPC handle.
  • #WebArchiving

    • Tools & Software

    Replay

  • InterPlanetary Wayback (ipwb)stars500 - Web Archive (WARC) indexing and replay using IPFS.
  • Reconstructive - Reconstructive is a ServiceWorker module for client-side reconstruction of composite mementos by rerouting resource requests to corresponding archived copies (JavaScript).

    • Tools & Software

    WARC I/O Libraries

  • jwarcstars33 - Reading and write WARC files with a typesafe API (Java).
  • warciostars264 - Streaming WARC/ARC library for fast web archive IO (Python).
  • warctoolsstars110 - Library to work with ARC and WARC files (Python).
  • webarchivestars16 - Golang readers for ARC and WARC webarchive formats (Golang).

    • Training/Documentation

  • The WARC Standard:
    • The warc-specifications community HTML version of the official specification and hub for new proposals.
    • The offical ISO 28500 WARC specification homepage.

    • Tools & Software

    Utilities

  • ArchiveToolsstars53 - Collection of tools to extract and interact with WARC files (Python).
  • har2warcstars38 - Convert HTTP Archive (HAR) -> Web Archive (WARC) format (Python).
  • The Archive Browser - The Archive Browser is a program that lets you browse the contents of archives, as well as extract them. It will let you open files from inside archives, and lets you preview them using Quick Look. WARC is supported (macOS only, Proprietary app).
  • The Unarchiver - Program to extract the contents of many archive formats, inclusive of WARC, to a file system. Free variant of The Archive Browser (macOS only, Proprietary app).

    • Tools & Software

    Quality Assurance

  • Chrome Check My Links - Browser extension: a link checker with more options.
  • Chrome link checker - Browser extension: basic link checker.
  • Chrome link gopher - Browser extension: link harvester on a page.
  • Chrome Open Multiple URLs - Browser extension: opens multiple URLs and also extracts URLs from text.
  • Chrome Revolver - Browser extension: switches between browser tabs.
  • FlameShotstars19k - Screen capture and annotation on Ubuntu.
  • PlayOnLinux - For running Xenu and Notepad++ on Ubuntu.
  • PlayOnMac - For running Xenu and Notepad++ on macOS.
  • Windows Snipping Tool - Windows built-in for partial screen capture and annotation. On macOS you can use Command + Shift + 4 (keyboard shortcut for taking partial screen capture).
  • WineBottler - For running Xenu and Notepad++ on macOS.
  • xDoToolstars2.1k - Click automation on Ubuntu.
  • Xenu - Desktop link checker for Windows.

    • Community Resources

    Slack

  • Archives Unleashed Slack - Fill out this request form for access to a researcher group of people working with web archives.
  • Archivers Slack - Invite yourself to a multi-disciplinary effort for archiving projects run in affiliation with EDGI and Data Together.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Resources for Web Publishers

  • Stanford Libraries' Archivability pages
  • The Archive Ready tool, for estimating how likely a web page will be archived successfully.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Mar 12th - Mar 18th, 2018
item.description:
Tools & Software

Search & Discovery

  • SecurityTrails - Web based archive for WHOIS and DNS records. REST API available free of charge.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jun 26th - Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Tools & Software

  • Comparison of web archiving software
  • Awesome Website Change Monitoringstars421

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jun 19th - Jun 25th, 2017
item.description:
Tools & Software

Utilities

  • webarchive-indexingstars35 - Tools for bulk indexing of WARC/ARC files on Hadoop, EMR or local file system.

item.title: iipc/awesome-web-archiving Jun 12th - Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Community Resources

Blogs and Scholarship

  • IIPC Blog

    • Training/Documentation

  • Introductions to web archiving concepts:
    • What is a web archive? - A video from the UK Web Archive YouTube Channel
    • Wikipedia's List of Web Archiving Initiatives
    • Glossary of Archive-It and Web Archiving Terms
    • The Web Archiving Lifecycle Model - The Web Archiving Lifecycle Model is an attempt to incorporate the technological and programmatic arms of the web archiving into a framework that will be relevant to any organization seeking to archive content from the web. Archive-It, the web archiving service from the Internet Archive, developed the model based on its work with memory institutions around the world.
    • Training materials: module for beginners (8 sessions)
    • UNT Web Archiving Course 2022stars12
    • Continuing Education to Advance Web Archiving (CEDWARC)

    • Community Resources

    Mailing Lists

  • IIPC
